API Reference
=============

Top-level modules that survived the 2026-05 restructure. Removed
``scitex_dev.{skills,fix,ci,deploy,versions,docs,search,_discovery,_manifest,_builder}``
were absorbed into ``_cli/``, ``_creds/``, ``_ecosystem/``, etc. — see
the CLI surface and per-subcommand entry points for the live API.

CLI entry point
---------------

.. automodule:: scitex_dev.cli
   :members:
   :undoc-members:

CLI subcommand groups
---------------------

.. automodule:: scitex_dev._cli
   :members:
   :undoc-members:

----

.. automodule:: scitex_dev._core
   :members:
   :undoc-members:

---------

.. automodule:: scitex_dev._ecosystem
   :members:
   :undoc-members:

-----------

.. automodule:: scitex_dev._creds
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
